about.title: About CDCF
about.description: The Catholic Digital Commons Foundation nurtures open-source projects that serve the Catholic community worldwide.

footer.copyright: Catholic Digital Commons Foundation. All rights reserved.
footer.tagline: Building the digital commons for the Catholic community.

hero.defaultSubtitle: Nurturing open-source projects that serve the Catholic community worldwide.

projects.noResults: No projects match the selected filters.
projects.submitDescription: Have an open-source project that serves the Catholic community? Submit it for review.
projects.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the project and its purpose
projects.successMessage: Your project has been submitted for review. We'll take a look shortly.
projects.errorMessage: Please try again later or contact us directly.
projects.checkEmailMessage: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to complete your submission.
projects.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
projects.codeExpired: Code has expired. Please request a new one.
projects.tooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.

community.onlineIntro: Join our online communities to connect with fellow Catholic developers and contributors.
community.localGroupsIntro: Find a local group near you or start your own to build community in person.
community.referDescription: Know a Catholic tech group that should be listed here? Let us know and we'll review it.
community.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the group and its activities
community.successMessage: Your referral has been submitted for review. We'll take a look shortly.
community.errorMessage: Please try again later or contact us directly.
community.checkEmailMessage: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to complete your referral.
community.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
community.codeExpired: Code has expired. Please request a new one.
community.tooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.
